Architecture

Composable files

Agents

Reusable role definitions.

Skills

Focused instruction sets.

Commands

One-shot workflows.

Hooks

Lifecycle interceptors.

MCP servers

External tool bridges.

Settings

Project-level defaults.

Problem

Repeated plumbing

Same prompts

Rewritten in every project.

Same guards

Copy-pasted safety rules.

Same setup

Hand-rolled tool wiring.
